response.justification: While the candidate has broad full-stack experience and some exposure to AI-agent tooling, they lack demonstrable production-scale experience in multi-agent AI systems, fintech infrastructure, or regulated AI deployment — core requirements for this CTO role. Their work at re:cinq mentions AI-agent infrastructure but provides no depth on event-driven orchestration, real-time financial decisioning, or team scaling beyond individual contributor roles. No evidence of leading engineering teams of 10+ or governing hybrid external engineering models is present.
strengths: Exposure to agentic workflows via MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong full-stack and systems programming background (DLang, Node.js, event-driven systems)
Active open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: No evidence of building or operating production multi-agent AI systems in fintech
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams or developing technical leadership layers
No demonstrated experience with financial compliance, credit risk systems, or regulated AI deployment
